# vtm_glb_service (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `algorithm` (String)
- `all_monitors_needed` (Boolean)
- `autorecovery` (Boolean)
- `chained_auto_failback` (Boolean)
- `chained_location_order` (List of String)
- `disable_on_failure` (Boolean)
- `dnssec_keys` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dnssec_keys))
- `dnssec_keys_json` (String)
- `domains` (Set of String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `geo_effect` (Number)
- `last_resort_response` (Set of String)
- `location_draining` (Set of String)
- `location_settings` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--location_settings))
- `location_settings_json` (String)
- `log_enabled` (Boolean)
- `log_filename` (String)
- `log_format` (String)
- `return_ips_on_fail` (Boolean)
- `rules` (List of String)
- `ttl` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--dnssec_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dnssec_keys`

Required:

- `domain` (String)
- `ssl_key` (Set of String)

### Nested Schema for `location_settings`
